name: aws-agents
description: Build, deploy, and operate AI agents on AWS. Skills for scaffolding agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore (Strands, LangGraph), connecting tools via Gateway and MCP, multi-agent and A2A orchestration, memory, Cedar policies, evaluation, observability, debugging traces and logs, and production hardening (inbound auth, IAM, rate limiting, cold-start tuning).

interface.shortDescription: Build, deploy, and operate AI agents on AWS.
interface.longDescription: Complete developer workflow for building AI agents on AWS — scaffolding with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore (Strands, LangGraph), tool integration via Gateway and MCP, multi-agent and A2A orchestration, memory, Cedar policies, evaluation and observability, debugging traces and logs, VPC networking, and production hardening (inbound auth, IAM scoping, rate limiting, cold-start tuning).
defaultPrompt: How do I build an agent on AWS?
My agent isn't working, help me debug it.
